Campaign name: Your Campaign Name
Brand: Brand Name
Market: US
Audience: Who this is for

Message: Primary headline / campaign line
CTA: Call to action
Supporting copy: (optional)
Legal disclaimer: (optional)

Creative direction:
Describe the look, pose, lighting, set, and what must stay locked.
Say what is forbidden.

Style tags: tag-one, tag-two
Motion notes: (optional; used later on Results when you choose stills to animate)

Products:
1) Product or Scene Name
   Category: product category
   Mode: generate-concept (or use-provided if you will upload a hero product photo)
   Role: lifestyle_angle
   Asset hint: What the hero image should show. Lock pose/outfit/product details here.
   Notes: Upload product/logo/style/likeness files in the UI after this brief.

Outputs: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9
Framing: both (or close-up, or zoomed)
Languages: (optional; leave blank to decide later)
